name: Kirigami
description: KDEs QtQuick-based framework for building convergent (desktop+mobile) applications with unified design language.

seo.title: Kirigami — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Kirigami: KDEs QtQuick-based framework for building convergent (desktop+mobile) applications with unified design language.

when_to_use: Convergent KDE app running identically on desktop and mobile
GNOME-alternative Qt-based app with unified design language
Linux + Android app from a single QtQuick/Kirigami codebase
Community KDE application contributing to the Plasma ecosystem
Cross-form-factor productivity app built with QML

cons: Tied to KDE and Qt ecosystem
Smaller community than GTK or Flutter
Qt licensing concerns for commercial use
review.verdict: Niche choice for KDE and Plasma Mobile — mostly relevant if youre already invested in Qt and KDE.
review.best_for: KDE app developers building convergent desktop plus Plasma Mobile experiences
review.not_for: Cross-platform teams outside the KDE and Qt ecosystem

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
